alkylation reagent: modified for 30 min at 24 °C with 10 mM iodacetamide
alkylation concentration: modified for 30 min at 24 °C with 10 mM iodacetamide
cleavage agent: adding 0.025 ng/µL trypsin in a total volume of 100 µL
collision energy: at a normalized collision energy of 30%
fragmentation method: higher-energy collisional dissociation at a normalized collision energy of 30%
instrument: into an Orbitrap Eclipse Tribrid MS
reduction reagent: with 5 mM dithiothreitol for 30 min at 50 °C
reduction concentration: with 5 mM dithiothreitol for 30 min at 50 °C
